text:
User: Hi, my internet keeps disconnecting.
Agent: Sorry to hear that! Can you tell me your modem model?
User: ZX-3000
Agent: Thanks. Have you tried restarting the modem?
User: Yes, still drops.
Agent: Let's check your firmware version.
User: How do I check that?
Agent: Open 192.168.1.1 and go to Firmware Update.
User: Okay, it says update available.
Agent: Install it and restart your modem.
User: Done, connection is stable now.
Agent: Great! Glad to help.

User: Can I use this modem with fiber internet?
Agent: ZX-3000 only supports cable internet. Recommend ZX-Fiber.
User: Okay, thanks for the info!
Agent: You're welcome!

User: My billing shows extra charges.
Agent: Let’s check your invoice history.
User: I see 2 extra charges.
Agent: One is late payment, the other is tax adjustment.
User: Got it, thanks!
Agent: Happy to help.

Q: How to reset my modem?
A: Press and hold the reset button for 10 seconds until the lights blink.

Q: How to update firmware?
A: Login to 192.168.1.1 → Firmware Update → Check for Updates.

Q: How to enable guest Wi-Fi?
A: Admin panel → Wi-Fi Settings → Guest Network → Enable.

Q: What speeds does ZX-3000 support?
A: Up to 1 Gbps, dual-band Wi-Fi supported.

Q: Can I use it internationally?
A: Certified for US and Canada only.
Ticket #1001: Customer reported slow Wi-Fi. Troubleshooting revealed interference on 5 GHz band. Guided customer to switch channels. Issue resolved.
Ticket #1002: Customer unable to print documents. Identified driver issue. Guided to reinstall drivers. Issue resolved.

text.speaker: User
text.text: Hi, my internet drops randomly.

text.speaker: Agent
text.text: Let's check your modem model.

text.speaker: Agent
text.text: Your firmware is outdated. Please update it.

text.speaker: User
text.text: Hello, I can't connect my phone to Wi-Fi.

text.speaker: Agent
text.text: Is your phone detecting the network?

text.speaker: User
text.text: Yes, but it fails to authenticate.

text.speaker: Agent
text.text: Let's reset your Wi-Fi password and try again.

text: Ticket #1001: Customer reported slow Wi-Fi. Troubleshooting revealed interference on 5 GHz band. Guided customer to switch channels. Issue resolved.
Ticket #1002: Customer unable to print documents. Identified driver issue. Guided to reinstall drivers. Issue resolved.
